hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Incorporating multi-scale SEM imaging (e.g., 500×, 1000×, and 5000× magnification) into a hierarchical transfer learning framework will improve classification accuracy for subtle early-stage degradation states (e.g., <50 cycles) by enabling the model to learn both particle-level morphology and nanoscale surface film formation features that are not resolvable at a single magnification.
